title: Old Bronzan
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Old Bronzan''' was the southeastern district of the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Efavan/Legends|Efavan]], [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''
